title: Europe's largest asset manager Amundi debuts $100 million tokenized fund on Ethereum, Stellar
message_html: Europe's largest asset manager Amundi debuts $100 million tokenized fund on Ethereum, Stellar ...
snippet: Amundi launched the $100 million Spiko Amundi Overnight Swap Fund on Ethereum and Stellar with Chainlink support.

title: Quantum technology company BTQ Technologies announces first functional implementation of Bitcoin Improvement Proposal BIP-360
message_html: Quantum technology company BTQ Technologies announces first functional implementation of Bitcoin Improvement Proposal BIP-360 ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Quantum technology company BTQ Technologies announced that it has successfully deployed the first functional implementation of Bitcoin Improvement Proposal BIP-360 on its Bitcoin Quantum testnet (v0.3.0). BIP-360 introduces a new output type called “Pay-to-Merkle-Root”

title: MLB taps Polymarket as exclusive partner, teams with CFTC on betting integrity after last year's scandal
